title: Lebanon Mourns After Israeli Barrage Kills at Least 203 People
summary_full: The intense bombardment, which Israel said included more than 100 airstrikes in 10 minutes, was a sharp escalation that put pressure on the shaky cease-fire with Iran.
summary_public: The intense bombardment, which Israel said included more than 100 airstrikes in 10 minutes, was a sharp escalation that put pressure on the shaky cease-fire with Iran.
